Short CV

Berat Dağ completed his undergraduate education at Anadolu University, Department of Sociology in 2015, by presenting his dissertation titled "Debates on Turkey's Social Structure". Afterwards, Dağ defended her thesis titled "A Historical Sociological Evaluation of Ottoman State and Social Structure Discussions in Turkish Thought" at Anadolu University, Department of Sociology in 2017, and received her master's degree. Dağ's doctoral education, which started at Anadolu University, Department of Sociology, was completed in 2023. His doctoral thesis is titled “Limitations of World Civilization: Historical Sociology of Nativeism Based on Turkish Cinema and Novel”. Focusing on Turkish thought, Turkish sociology, Turkish cinema, Ottoman state and social structure, Turkey's social structure, East-West relations and historical sociological method, Dağ's main area of interest is discussions of indigenousness.
